name: Chewy Coconut Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 cup sugar or sugar substitute equal to 1 cup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Beat egg substitute, sugar substitute and maple flavoring in a medium bowl; mix in margarine and vanilla.
3. Combine flour, baking powder and salt in small bowl; stir into egg mixture.
4. Mix in coconut, walnuts and raisins. Spread evenly in greased 8-inch square baking pan.
5. Bake until browned and toothpick inserted in center comes out clean, about 20 minutes.
6. Cool on a wire rack; cut into squares.
